paneContent:
в—Ҹ Edit SignupForm.jsx +29
  в”” src/prototypes/main.folder/StartupSignup/SignupForm.jsx


в—Ҹ Edit SignupForm.jsx +8 -4
  в”” src/prototypes/main.folder/StartupSignup/SignupForm.jsx


в—Ҹ Edit SignupForm.jsx +4 -1
  в”” src/prototypes/main.folder/StartupSignup/SignupForm.jsx


в—Ҹ Save output + notify leader (shell)
  в”Ӯ export STORYBOARD_WIDGET_ID=agent-v2qu53
  в”Ӯ npx storyboard terminal output --summary "OAuth buttons now functional" --content "Wired Google + GitHub
  в”Ӯ OAuth buttons in SignupForm.jsx. Clicking either: sets signup.oauthProvider, sets signup.status='oauth'
  в”Ӯ (button shows 'ConnectingвҖҰ' + disables both), pre-fills signup.fullName/email/company/password/agreedToTerms
  в”Ӯ with provider-specific mock values, then after 900ms sets signup.status='success' to render the success card.вҖҰ
  в”” 9 lines...


в—Ҹ Done. Wired the OAuth buttons in SignupForm.jsx:

   - Click Google or GitHub вҶ’ button shows ConnectingвҖҰ and both disable
   - Pre-fills the form via useOverride: signup.oauthProvider, signup.fullName, signup.email, signup.company,
  signup.password, signup.agreedToTerms
   - After ~900ms transitions signup.status from oauth вҶ’ success, rendering the success card with the provider name
   - Provider-specific mock data (Gmail-style email for Google, users.noreply.github.com for GitHub)
   - Still Tailwind-only, no real OAuth

  Canvas auto-refreshes since the prototype is visible. Leader notified.

 ~/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.6.0 [вҺҮ 0.6.0*%]                                                @README.md
